name: Importer Excise Tax Refund and Interest

eligibility.description: Applies to proof gallons produced outside the U.S. and imported after December 31, 2022, provided the importer is an electing importer with assigned quantities.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a refund (plus interest) to importers for the difference between the standard tax rate paid at the border and the reduced rates they are eligible for via assignment.
